properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I hear the sound of freedom, Jubilee Seven thunders speaking my liberty And I’ve climbed the mountain Seen the risen Son It’s Jubilee, my Jubilee

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The Supreme Judge appeared in 1963 Then the Lamb took the Book and opened the Seals We’ve heard the preaching of the acceptable year We’ve heard the trumpet sound Every man can go free

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now here we are After fifty years We’ve seen the end of time rapidly drawing near No matter what you’ve done, you can now go free Yes all your debts are paid If you will just see grace

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We are free My chains have been broken I’m no longer a slave The prison doors are opened I’m no longer in bondage My pardon was signed It was done on Calvary At the appearing of the Cloud We can claim our redemption Who the Son of Man has set free Is free indeed
